raw_content: Customer reports that bulk export feature times out when trying to export more than 100k records. They need to export their quarterly reports but the operation fails consistently.
Small team frustrated that there's no API documentation for the new analytics endpoints. They've spent two days trying to reverse-engineer the correct request format.
Support request: user can't reset their password and is locked out. Reset email button doesn't send anything. This is a critical blocker for their team.
Customer wants dark mode for the dashboard. They say their team works late nights and the bright UI causes eye strain. Not a blocker but requested by 3+ users from their org.
Enterprise customer reports that real-time collaboration feature is lagging. When multiple people edit the same document, changes take 10-15 seconds to sync. Defeats the purpose of 'real-time'.
Startup asks if there's a bulk delete feature. Currently they have to manually delete records one at a time, which takes hours. They're considering switching because of this inefficiency.
